name: TeamSpeak
description: Connect OpenClaw to TeamSpeak 3 servers via text chat

server.description: TeamSpeak server address (host or host:port, default port 9987)

nickname.description: Bot nickname on the TeamSpeak server

identity.description: TS3 identity string (omit to auto-generate and persist)

allowFrom.description: TS3 UIDs allowed to DM the bot

groupAllowFrom.description: TS3 UIDs allowed to trigger the bot in channels

mentionPatterns.description: Regex patterns for mention detection in channel messages

groups.description: Per-channel overrides keyed by TS3 channel ID (use '*' for defaults)

enabled.description: Enable TTS voice playback of replies into the bot's TS3 channel (default false)

replyMode.description: How to deliver replies: voice only, text only, or both (default both)

enabled.description: Enable speech-to-text: transcribe voice from TS3 users and process as text messages (default false)

silenceTimeoutMs.description: Milliseconds of silence before a voice segment is considered complete (default 300)

minDurationMs.description: Minimum voice segment duration in ms; shorter segments are discarded (default 500)
